title: ceiba speciosa
intro: Ceiba speciosa, also known as the Kapok tree or Velvet Kapok, is a species of evergreen tree native to Central and South America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, wounds, and skin infections. The health benefits of Ceiba speciosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and provide antioxidant properties. Ceiba speciosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
